## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — New workflow, action, or user-facing capability
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix or correction
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — Maintenance, dependency update, or config change
- [ ] `refactor` — Code restructure without behaviour change
- [ ] `ci` — CI/CD pipeline change
- [ ] `perf` — Performance improvement
- [ ] Breaking change (existing callers must update their configuration)

## Testing

<!-- Describe how you verified the change works as expected. -->

- [ ] Tested locally with `pre-commit run --all-files`
- [ ] Verified in a test repository or via a dry-run workflow
- [ ] N/A — documentation or config-only change

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format
- [ ] Branch is rebased on top of `main`
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` has been updated under `Unreleased` (skip for dependency-only PRs)
- [ ] `README.md` has been updated if a new workflow or action was added
- [ ] All CI checks pass
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or sensitive values are included
